nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Amitabha. Greetings, benefactor. This poor monk is Xu Zhu, a disciple of Shaolin Temple. Have you come here for the Zhenlong Go puzzle?

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Years ago, this poor monk accidentally solved the Zhenlong Go puzzle, and my fate changed completely. The mysteries contained in that puzzle are truly unfathomable.

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Though this poor monk is not talented, when solving the Zhenlong puzzle, I did comprehend some principles. If benefactor is interested, this poor monk can teach you.

options.text: Master, I'd like to play another game with you

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: The Zhenlong Go puzzle is the world's most extraordinary puzzle - countless masters tried to solve it and failed. This poor monk could solve it back then entirely through one character: 'Nothing.'

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: 'Breaking Zhenlong' means not being constrained by conventions, using no-move to defeat all moves, finding life in seemingly unsolvable situations.

options.text: Profoundly mysterious! Please teach me, Master

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Amitabha. Since benefactor has this intention, this poor monk will play a game with you to see your understanding.

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Though this poor monk's Go skill is limited, after breaking Zhenlong, I gained some understanding of the Way of Go. If benefactor can beat this poor monk, it proves you have the aptitude.

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Benefactor's Go skill is impressive, and more rare is not being constrained by conventions. In that case, this poor monk will teach you the essence of 'Breaking Zhenlong.'

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: The key to this technique is: in desperate situations, don't be constrained by conventions, use no-move to defeat all moves, finding seemingly impossible ways to break through. Limited to once per game with a 55-move cooldown.

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Remember, 'nothing is something, something is nothing.' When using this technique, let go of attachments and observe the game with an ethereal mind.

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Now that benefactor has learned this technique, you can calmly handle even the most difficult puzzles in the future. But remember, the Way of Go is like the Way of Buddha - it's all about understanding.

options.text: I'd like to hear more of your teachings
I want to challenge you again

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Don't be discouraged, benefactor. This poor monk was also confused when breaking Zhenlong - everything follows fate.

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: This poor monk was just an unremarkable little monk at Shaolin Temple. After breaking Zhenlong, my fate changed completely.

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: However, no matter the changes, this poor monk remembers Master's teaching: 'Keep goodness in your heart, have foundation in your actions.' The same goes for Go.

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Excellent, excellent, the time is not yet right. When benefactor is ready, you can come anytime.

nodes.speaker: Xu Zhu
nodes.text: Amitabha. May benefactor persevere on the path of Go.
